Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: If there is a Holy Grail for skate and classic Nordic Skiing , it is at Nubs Nob today !

nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails are groomed, conditions are fast.
nubsNob.comments: The snow is machine groomed, fine granular snow this morning. Our Grooming Crew took extra time to grind the firm snow last night creating the best possible conditions for the day. Please be aware that ungroomed snow will be very firm this morning. Sun is forecast today. The kitchen has a Blue Gill sandwich special today. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with an espresso bar. The lifts are spinning daily from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
